lines.text: WHENEVER THE TIME IS RIGHT, WE BRING YOU KNOW
LEDGE. THE KNOWLEDGE COMES FROM AFAR. ONLY REA
DING THE MESSAGE, IS NOT TO UNDERSTANDING IT. A
CLEAR MIND IS ABLE TO DECRYPT IT. BRING IT TO
THE CHOSEN SOUL WILL GET KNOWLEDGE AND OUR KEY
TO OUR ETERNAL LIBRARY. A KEY WITH WHICH EVER
YTHING WILL BE UNDERSTOOD. A SOURCE OF KNOWLE
DGE FOR MANY CENTURIES. THOSE WHO SEE THE NUMBE
RS AND UNDERSTAND THEIR MEANING, IS THE WAY OPE
N. FOR OTHERS WHO MAY NOT UNDERSTAND ANYTHING,
YOU CALCULATED ALWAYS OUR NUMBERS TO GET A PIEC
E OF THE TRUTH BEHIND OUR SCRIPTURES. SO WE GIV
E YOU THIS ULTIMATIVE CHALLENGE. YOU WILL UNDE
RSTAND EVERYTHING BETTER WITH THIS MANUAL.
at the bottom of the page. }
